sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 6:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 6:1
items.html: Two kinds of coupling: The first coupling was by the ascent of the screen and the records to the Rosh of SAG, to the Nikvey Einayim, from which came the phase of Katnut of Nekudim. The second coupling was by the coupling of AB and SAG, and the breaching of the Parsa. Consequently, the AHP returned to the phase of Rosh, and from here emerged the Gadlut of Nekudim. (Inner Light, Item 14)
